strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across Node.js, TypeScript, and React
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong TDD/CI/CD background with multiple languages (TS, Java, DLang, C++)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms, ~2016-2018)
Vitest not explicitly listed; testing stack references are older (Selenium, Jest implied)
response.justification: Candidate clearly exceeds the 6+ years bar with deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React work at Optilyz, RIDE, and re:cinq, and directly matches the AI-agent requirement via current MCP code-generator work. Database (MongoDB), cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, and Git proficiency are all evidenced. Gaps: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, and Kotlin is absent (Java experience exists but is older). Strong engineering craftsmanship signals (TDD, workshops, OSS) suggest the framework gaps are easily bridgeable.
